steps.title: Identify the cause-effect relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that millions of people use the metro annually. The second sentence describes maintenance efforts by city officials. The key signal is the cause-effect relationship: heavy usage (cause) requires maintenance (effect).

steps.title: Match the transition showing consequence
steps.content: ”Accordingly” expresses consequence—the maintenance efforts follow as a necessary result of heavy usage. The other three convey options, illustration, and contrast rather than causal result. That matches choice A — A is correct.
